name: akbun-filestruture-b
description: File/folder structure card image prompt and Figma/Canva SVG skills by akbun

interface.shortDescription: Folder structure card image prompt and SVG
interface.longDescription: Turns a file/folder structure into a dark-panel folder list card: an image generation prompt for AI image models and an editable SVG for Figma or Canva.
defaultPrompt: Make a folder-structure card image prompt and a Figma/Canva SVG from this content
